title: Eric Weinstein on UFOs
summary: Eric Weinstein discusses his initial dismissal and subsequent reconsideration of UAP/UFO phenomena. He acknowledges his previous strong aversion to the topic while expressing ongoing skepticism about the lack of conclusive video evidence despite widespread sensor coverage.

acronyms.definition: An aerial phenomenon that cannot be immediately identified
Modern terminology for unidentified flying objects, used by government agencies

key_claims.claim: The federal government is tracking UAPs
Despite widespread sensors and cameras, there is no conclusive proof of UAPs from sources outside the government
UAP/UFO topics are now being discussed openly, indicating a shift from previous dismissal
